MAP.COMMENT: == Update test table status to completed ==

Values.value: The water sampling for the site %samplingRequest/locationSite% with id %samplingRequest/requestId% has already been submitted
Request for the area %samplingRequest/locationSite% has already been raised

MAP.COMMENT: == Appending error message to message list ==

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: == Error message for submitted status without draft ==

Values.value: Request status cannot be added as 'SUBMITTED'

MAP.COMMENT: == Appending error message to message list ==

Values.value: The test for %samplingRequest/samplingTest/samplingLocation% on %samplingRequest/samplingTest/samplingPoint% already exists

MAP.COMMENT: == Appending error message to message list ==
== Assigning request Id from parent table to child table ==

Values.value: The test for %samplingRequest/samplingTest/samplingLocation% on %samplingRequest/samplingTest/samplingPoint% already exists

MAP.COMMENT: == Appending error message to message list ==

Values.value: Test result with %samplingRequest/samplingTest/testResult/testId% and %samplingRequest/samplingTest/testResult/parameter% already exists and cannot be updated

MAP.COMMENT: == Appending error message to message list ==
== Assigning sampling date and test Id ==

Values.value: Test id %samplingRequest/samplingTest/testResult/testId% with parameter %samplingRequest/samplingTest/testResult/parameter% already exists

MAP.COMMENT: == Appending error message to message list ==

Values.value: The service has been executed successfully(Universal message). Check message list for any validation errors
The service has been flagged with an error. Transaction has been restored
